heading: Dairy forward pricing pilot program
label: 627 Dairy forward pricing pilot program
notes: CodificationAnother section 23 of act amended former , Banks and Banking.May 12, 1933section 781 of Title 12
amendments: CodificationAnother section 23 of act amended former , Banks and Banking.May 12, 1933section 781 of Title 12

children.heading: Pilot program required
children.label: a Pilot program required
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary of Agriculture shall establish a temporary pilot program under which milk producers and cooperatives are authorized to voluntarily enter into forward price contracts with milk handlers.November 29, 1999
all regulated minimum milk price requirements of paragraphs (B) and (F) of subsection (5) of ; andsection 608c of this title
the requirement of paragraph (C) of such subsection regarding total payments by each handler.

children.heading: Milk covered by pilot program
children.label: c Milk covered by pilot program
A
children.text: is not classified as Class I milk or otherwise intended for fluid use; and

children.label: B
children.text: is in the current of interstate or foreign commerce or directly burdens, obstructs, or affects interstate or foreign commerce in federally regulated milk.

children.heading: Relation to Class I milk
children.label: 2 Relation to Class I milk
children.text: To assist milk handlers in complying with the limitation in paragraph (1)(A) without having to segregate or otherwise individually track the source and disposition of milk, a milk handler may allocate milk receipts from producers, cooperatives, and other sources that are not subject to a forward contract to satisfy the handler’s obligations with regard to Class I milk usage.

children.heading: Duration
children.label: d Duration
children.text: The authority of the Secretary of Agriculture to carry out the pilot program shall terminate on . No forward price contract entered into under the program may extend beyond that date.December 31, 2004

children.heading: Study and report on effect of pilot program
children.label: e Study and report on effect of pilot program

children.heading: Study
children.label: 1 Study
children.text: The Secretary of Agriculture shall conduct a study on forward contracting between milk producers and cooperatives and milk handlers to determine the impact on milk prices paid to producers in the United States. To obtain information for the study, the Secretary may use the authorities available to the Secretary under , subject to the confidentiality requirements of subsection (2) of such section.section 608d of this title

children.heading: Report
children.label: 2 Report
children.text: Not later than , the Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition and Forestry of the Senate and the Committee on Agriculture of the House of Representatives a report containing the results of the study.April 30, 2002
